productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Diana Black Casual Shoes
description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, slip into the Diana casual shoes from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! With attractive two-toned laces and a fabulous synthetic and nubuck leather combination, these lightweight shoes are not just great looking, but are also super comfortable. Pair them with your best pair of jeans and a smart tee to look like a fashionista. Upper Full grain and nubuck leather upper for added durability and style Nubuck leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and on the forefoot for better support Full grain leather on the sides with a perforated design for added style and structure Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Two-toned laces for added attraction Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on lateral side of midfoot and behind the collar Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Grooves in a “Pacman” design all over the outsole for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
